name: agentx2.ai
description: AgentX2.ai — AI-native consulting firm, managed AI workforce, and enterprise AI platform. Public website + operating-system foundation.

scripts.validate: node scripts/check-links.mjs && node scripts/check-orphans.mjs && node scripts/check-seo.mjs && node scripts/check-a11y.mjs && node scripts/check-doc-links.mjs
scripts.gates: npm run build && npm run test && npm run validate
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm run build && npm run test && npm run validate && npm run lint:md
scripts.release-check: npm run ci && npm run audit:prod
